---
title: "Graduação"
subtitle: "Disciplinas ministradas na graduação em Engenharia Elétrica"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: .
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Período"
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
---

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-listing-category').forEach(function(container) {
    var cats = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.category'));
    if (!cats.length) return;
    cats.sort(function(a, b) {
      var ta = a.textContent.trim(), tb = b.textContent.trim();
      var aIsAll = ta.startsWith('Tudo') || ta.startsWith('All'), bIsAll = tb.startsWith('Tudo') || tb.startsWith('All');
      if (aIsAll) return -1; if (bIsAll) return 1;
      var aIsAtual = ta.startsWith('Atual'), bIsAtual = tb.startsWith('Atual');
      if (aIsAtual && !bIsAll) return -1; if (bIsAtual && !aIsAll) return 1;
      var aIsAnterior = ta.startsWith('Anterior'), bIsAnterior = tb.startsWith('Anterior');
      if (aIsAnterior && !bIsAll && !bIsAtual) return -1;
      if (bIsAnterior && !aIsAll && !bIsAtual) return 1;
      return ta.localeCompare(tb);
    });
    cats.forEach(function(c) { container.appendChild(c); });
  });
});
</script>
